name: Shadcn Ui
scan_summary: Large modular plugin marketplace with 10 plugins and 174 total components (skills, agents, commands). MIT licensed. Makefile provides cross-CLI installation for Claude Code, Copilot, OpenCode, and Codex. Plugins are organized into separate directories with their own skills/agents/commands. Python and shell scripts in scripts/ are packaging/installation utilities. .skills-validator-check file present for validation tooling. pyproject.toml for Python tooling.

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 10/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 38 files analyzed. Found: 1 network, 11 file, 3 env, 0 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 634 findings: 1 critical, 237 high, 359 medium, 37 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 634 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
